_comment: Baseline of known/expected failures so the dashboard separates NEW regressions from already-tracked backend bugs. A smoke 'fail' whose key matches an entry here is shown as 'known-red' (muted), not a new regression. Type follows the ReportPortal taxonomy: Product Bug | Automation Bug | System Issue.

issues.note: SCP backend 500 on /v1/planned-computes/server-types; tracked upstream, not a regression in our suite.

DELETE /v1/clusters/{id}/backups 401s while every other sub-op in the same live-cluster window 2xxes (run 27346642059, lifecycle database-mysql-cluster) — matches the known backup-family/query-string HMAC signing suspicion (handoff: '401 backup-family retry'). Harness-side signing fix queued; unmute when it lands.

DELETE /v1/clusters/{id}/backups 401s while every other sub-op in the same live-cluster window 2xxes (run 27346642059, lifecycle database-postgresql-cluster) — matches the known backup-family/query-string HMAC signing suspicion (handoff: '401 backup-family retry'). Harness-side signing fix queued; unmute when it lands.

POST /v1/budgets/account -> 500 ContactAdminForAssistance with a complete-looking body incl. amount (run 27395331657, gen-wave-mgmisc). A validation problem must not 500. Muted pending backend fix; node stays docs-provenance and out of composed waves.

PF-19 — PUT /v1/apis/{api_id}/resource-policies -> 500 ContactAdminForAssistance with the proven policy_document shape (run 27466988779, gen-wave5-apigw-policy). Previously thought VERIFIED; a write that worked before now 5xxes. Muted pending backend fix; the composed step tolerates 500 so the chain survives.
